query_title: The Best Century of My Life

recommendations.title: Lucky
recommendations.overview: The story of a young mother with a failed marriage behind her, who fights daily for her dream to open a hair salon, challenging her fate in an effort to free herself and gain independence and right to happiness.

recommendations.title: You Can't Save Yourself Alone
recommendations.overview: Gaetano and Delia, a separated couple, try to pick up the pieces of their broken love, recalling all the faults and the mistakes which led them to where they are now.

recommendations.title: Life Itself
recommendations.overview: As a young New York couple goes from college romance to marriage and the birth of their first child, the unexpected twists of their journey create reverberations that echo over continents and through lifetimes.

recommendations.title: Twice Born
recommendations.overview: Full-throttle melodrama about an ill-starred romance set against the backdrop of the siege of Sarajevo. A mother brings her teenage son to Sarajevo, where his father died in the Bosnian conflict years ago.

recommendations.title: The Great Beauty
recommendations.overview: Jep Gambardella has seduced his way through the lavish nightlife of Rome for decades, but after his 65th birthday and a shock from the past, Jep looks past the nightclubs and parties to find a timeless landscape of absurd, exquisite beauty.

recommendations.title: Clock
recommendations.overview: On the eve of her 38th birthday, a woman desperately attempts to fix her broken biological clock.

recommendations.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button
recommendations.overview: Born under unusual circumstances, Benjamin Button springs into being as an elderly man in a New Orleans nursing home and ages in reverse. Twelve years after his birth, he meets Daisy, a child who flits in and out of his life as she grows up to be a d

recommendations.title: The Baby of Mâcon
recommendations.overview: In 17th-century Tuscany, a church play is performed for the benefit of young aristocrat Cosimo. In the play, a grotesque old woman gives birth to a beautiful baby boy. The child's older sister is quick to exploit the situation, selling blessings from

recommendations.title: Like Father, Like Son
recommendations.overview: Ryota Nonomiya is a successful businessman driven by money. He learns that his biological son was switched with another child after birth. He must make a life-changing decision and choose his true son or the boy he raised as his own.

recommendations.title: In Safe Hands
